iterations.termination: Read-only health check. Termination criteria met: all 3 canaries PASS 'Submitted and indexed', sitemap 0 errors / 0 warnings, indexed flat (API lag, not a defect). In-budget backlog exhausted -> no forced change. Loop idle until (a) human grants a budget exception for dynamic-llms-txt, or (b) new backlog items are added.
